src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Refactor configuration initialization to use a Sourceable interface instead of direct instantiation.
Store MetricRegistry as a class field to enable registration of custom metrics and reporters.
Add JMX reporter to expose metrics via JMX.
Add SLF4J reporter to log metrics periodically.
Add Prometheus exporter to expose metrics via HTTP endpoint.
Add Jetty server to host the Prometheus metrics servlet.
Add atomic counter to track total number of processed records.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.human_impl: private final AtomicLong records = new AtomicLong();

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Add atomic counter to track total size of processed data.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.human_impl: private final AtomicLong allSize = new AtomicLong();

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Register a gauge metric to measure message latency.
Register a gauge metric to measure partition depth in bytes.
Generate a UUID if the event message ID is null to ensure unique identification.
Add structured data element containing partition context information.
Add structured data element containing event-specific properties like offset and correlation ID.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Introduce a pluggable configuration source mechanism to support both property files and environment variables.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Added imports for MetricsConfig, EnvironmentSource, PropertySource, and Sourceable; implemented getConfigSource() method.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Simplify main method signature by catching generic Exception instead of specific IOException and InterruptedException.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Changed throws clause from 'throws IOException, InterruptedException' to 'throws Exception'.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Update AzureConfig instantiation to accept the new configuration source dependency.
Update EventContextConsumer instantiation to accept configuration source and Prometheus port.
Correct the EventProcessorClient configuration to use the specific event hub name instead of the namespace name.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Output.general_idea: The Output class was replaced by an interface, likely as part of a larger architectural refactoring to decouple the output implementation from the core logic.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Output.human_impl: Changed 'final class Output implements Consumer<byte[]>, AutoCloseable' to 'public interface Output extends Consumer<byte[]>, AutoCloseable' and removed all method implementations.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Output.general_idea: Removed imports for Codahale Metrics and RLP library as the implementation logic was removed.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Output.human_impl: Removed imports for com.codahale.metrics.*, com.teragrep.rlp_01.*, and org.slf4j.*.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Output.general_idea: Removed imports for Java IO and NIO classes that were used in the removed implementation.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Output.human_impl: Removed imports for java.io.IOException, java.nio.channels.UnresolvedAddressException, and java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/config.general_idea: Replace direct System.getProperty calls with a configurable Sourceable interface to decouple configuration retrieval from the JVM environment.
Replace direct System.getProperty calls with a custom Sourceable interface to decouple configuration retrieval from the JVM environment.
Add import for the new configuration source interface.
Add a field to hold the configuration source instance.
Update constructor to accept and initialize the configuration source.
Replace system property access with the new configuration source method for app name.
Replace system property access with the new configuration source method for hostname.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 11 to align with the migration.
Simplify resource exclusion patterns by replacing specific workflow file globs with a broader directory exclusion.
Replace the exclusion of the Jenkinsfile with an exclusion for the Dockerfile to reflect infrastructure changes.
Configure the Surefire plugin to pass an Azure namespace environment variable during test execution.

.github/workflows/ci.yaml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to use Java 11 instead of Java 8 to align with the project's migration target.

.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.general_idea: Configure Maven Central deployment to use GPG signing by injecting private key and passphrase secrets.
.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.human_impl: Added gpg-private-key and gpg-passphrase to setup-java step and MAVEN_GPG_PASSPHRASE env var.

.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.general_idea: Add a dedicated build step to package the application into an RPM file using a specific pom.xml.
.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.human_impl: Added 'Pack RPM' job step running mvn package on rpm/rpm.pom.xml.

.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.general_idea: Update the release attachment path to match the new RPM build output directory structure.
.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.human_impl: Changed files path from target/rpm/... to rpm/target/rpm/... with wildcard.

.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.general_idea: Authenticate with GitHub Container Registry to allow pushing Docker images.
.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.human_impl: Added 'Login to GitHub Container Registry' step using docker/login-action.

.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.general_idea: Build and push a Docker image to GitHub Container Registry as part of the release workflow.
.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.human_impl: Added steps to lowercase repo name, build image with docker buildx, and push to ghcr.io.

Add the IntelliJ IDEA project directory to the gitignore list to exclude IDE-specific configuration.
